description: Dayton agents on the site without a profile URL. To fix: open Lofty admin, find the agent's "Slug" field, set it to the value in `suggested_lofty_slug` (e.g. "nikole-locke"). The next sync will HEAD-request the URL and, if it resolves, auto-populate the agent's profileUrl. Cleveland agents are excluded from this report since Cleveland uses a different agent-page system.
